name: AEGIS WF12 — Water Supply Disruption Monitor

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incidentType: 'water_supply_disruption', severity: $json.severity, probability: $json.probability, message: $json.message, source: 'n8n_water_supply_monitor', metadata: { reportCount: $json.reportCount, contaminationReports: $json.contaminationReports, noWaterReports: $json.noWaterReports } }) }}
